snippet.title: Materialists | Official Trailer 3 HD | A24
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/A24subscribe

Written and directed by Academy Award nominee Celine Song and starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans, and Pedro Pascal. MATERIALISTS – In Theaters June 13. 

RELEASE DATE: June 13, 2025
DIRECTOR: Celine Song
CAST: Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans, and Pedro Pascal
